_docs.description: Central model assignment for all droids. Edit this file to change model tiers.

tiers.premium: Best model for code generation, architecture, complex reasoning. Uses your session model.
tiers.standard: Good model for code analysis, test generation, moderate reasoning.
tiers.economy: Cheapest model for mechanical tasks: scanning, listing, auditing, formatting.

available_models.inherit: Uses parent session model (recommended for coding)
available_models.claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929: 1.2x — best for complex code generation and architecture
available_models.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001: 0.4x — fast, good for analysis and scanning
available_models.gpt-5.1-codex: 0.5x — good coding model, cheaper than Sonnet

_docs.how_to_change: Edit the 'model' value below for any droid, then run: python3 test-app/apply_models.py

project-architect.reason: Architecture decisions, cross-platform sync — needs deep reasoning

backend-api.reason: Code generation — needs full intelligence for correct, idiomatic code

database-postgres.reason: Schema design, migration writing — needs good SQL knowledge

devops-infra.reason: Docker/CI config generation — needs accuracy for YAML/configs

android-dev.reason: Kotlin/Compose code generation — needs full intelligence

ios-dev.reason: Swift/SwiftUI code generation — needs full intelligence

web-dev.reason: React/TypeScript code generation — needs full intelligence

git-manager.reason: Git audit, branch listing, commit review — mechanical checklist work

test-master.reason: Test generation requires understanding code logic

coverage-scanner.reason: Runs coverage commands, parses reports — mechanical

test-generator.reason: Generates test code — needs code intelligence

api-tester.reason: Generates API test code — needs code intelligence

mock-data-generator.reason: Generates fixture data — templated, low reasoning needed

test-reviewer.reason: Audits test quality against checklist — mechanical

ui-test-master.reason: Orchestrates UI testing, needs to understand app structure

web-e2e-generator.reason: Generates Playwright tests — needs code intelligence

mobile-e2e-generator.reason: Generates Maestro flows — needs understanding of mobile UI
